autonomous_refueling.cn: Active in-orbit servicing and refueling demonstrations
autonomous_refueling.notes: No movement this week; commercial refueling tugs remain latent co-orbital inspection/grappling capability.
autonomous_refueling.us: Multiple commercial refueling/tug efforts in development

cislunar_operations.cn: Sustained lunar/cislunar mission investment with latent military utility
cislunar_operations.notes: US capability gap in cislunar spacecraft, propulsion, and SDA remains substantial and closing slowly despite doctrinal move.
cislunar_operations.us: SPACECOM studying offensive cislunar concepts; doctrinal shift acknowledged

counterspace_resilience.cn: Demonstrated counterspace intent; investment in degrading US awareness
counterspace_resilience.notes: Public US candor on vulnerability signals acceleration of distributed ground/EW investments.
counterspace_resilience.us: Epic Fury exposed distributed-ops and EW gaps; hardening pressure rising

geo_rpo.cn: Demonstrated GEO RPO and towing (e.g., SJ-series maneuvers)
geo_rpo.notes: No movement this week; remains a closely contested capability area.

high_power_orbital_platforms.cn: Multiple parallel LEO broadband/D2D programs (Qianfan, Guowang)
high_power_orbital_platforms.notes: Power-dense buses are inherently dual-use (sensors, DE, EW); China advancing D2D for denied-environment comms across parallel programs.
high_power_orbital_platforms.us: Muon Condor-Ultra (Starship-class) bus pitched; no anchor customer

on_orbit_retrieval_downmass.cn: Recoverable capsule heritage; no comparable commercial downmass-for-manufacturing vehicle disclosed
on_orbit_retrieval_downmass.notes: Starfall is planning-intent only but a latent on-orbit retrieval capability with intelligence utility if realized.
on_orbit_retrieval_downmass.us: SpaceX Starfall reentry vehicle in FAA-planning stage; Dragon downmass operational

orbital_transfer_vehicles.cn: Active but less publicly visible OTV/tug development
orbital_transfer_vehicles.notes: US widened lead in commercial OTV cadence; high-cadence OTV is latent responsive on-orbit maneuver / RPO capability.

responsive_launch.cn: Demonstrated no-notice maiden flight of reusable LM-12B with operational payloads
responsive_launch.notes: China narrowed gap this week with demonstrated hardware and no-notice posture compressing foreign characterization windows.
responsive_launch.us: Mature reusable cadence (Falcon 9); Tactically Responsive Space doctrine maturing

reusable_heavy_lift.cn: LM-12B converging on boostback/propulsive-landing architecture; medium-heavy class
reusable_heavy_lift.notes: China deliberately converging on proven Falcon 9 reuse design, compressing cost-per-kg curve faster than independent path.
reusable_heavy_lift.us: Operational reusable lead (Falcon 9/Heavy); Starship in development

sb_amti_targeting.notes: US moved to close perceived time-sensitive-targeting gap; multi-vendor approach adds counterspace resilience.
sb_amti_targeting.us: Funded proliferated LEO SB-AMTI layer ($4.16B SpaceX + planned multi-vendor)

space_based_interceptors.cn: No confirmed comparable space-based kinetic interceptor program
space_based_interceptors.notes: First US move toward space-based kinetic weapons in decades; overlaps co-orbital attack capability set; slippage likely.
space_based_interceptors.us: Northrop-Apex Golden Dome SBI; 2027 on-orbit demo target

vleo_persistent_isr.cn: Not the lead actor; India-Korea (Bellatrix/TelePIX) 2028 allied demo
vleo_persistent_isr.notes: Allied/partner VLEO propulsion development creates intel-sharing opportunity and proliferation-tracking need; air-breathing VLEO unproven at scale.
vleo_persistent_isr.us: Limited disclosed air-breathing VLEO ISR programs
